description: Video and live-stream moderation: keyframe extraction pipeline with real ffmpeg integration, two-tier image classification (edge fast + deep async), audio transcription via Whisper, and live moderation sampler for QuantMeet/QuantMax with auto-disconnect. Implements the Phase 20 requirements for video moderation (keyframe every 1s for first 30s, then every 5s) and live video moderation (sampled frames every 2s + keyword detection, auto-disconnect + temp ban).
steps: 1. Create packages/moderation/src/services/keyframe-extractor.ts: KeyframeExtractor class using fluent-ffmpeg that extracts frames from video files at configurable intervals. Default: every 1s for first 30s, then every 5s. Returns array of {timestamp, framePath} or Buffer[]. Supports both file path and stream input.

2. Create packages/moderation/src/services/audio-transcriber.ts: AudioTranscriber class with WhisperProvider interface. WhisperAPIProvider that calls OpenAI Whisper API (or self-hosted endpoint). Returns TranscriptionResult with {text, segments: {start, end, text, confidence}[]}. Supports chunked transcription for long audio.

3. Refactor packages/moderation/src/services/video-moderator.ts: Replace simulated frame sampling with real KeyframeExtractor integration. Two-tier classification: (a) edge tier - quick blur/skin-tone heuristic for instant blocking, (b) deep tier - full ImageClassifier for async detailed analysis. Audio track extraction via ffmpeg -> AudioTranscriber -> TextClassifier pipeline.

4. Create packages/moderation/src/services/live-moderator.ts: LiveModerator class for real-time stream moderation. Samples frames every 2s from a stream source (accepts frame Buffer pushed by caller). Runs keyword detection on audio transcript stream. Emits events: 'flag' (warning), 'disconnect' (auto-terminate), 'ban' (temp ban user). Configurable thresholds. Tracks per-session violation count for escalation.
5. Add types to packages/moderation/src/types.ts: KeyframeResult, TranscriptionResult, TranscriptionSegment, LiveModerationEvent, LiveModerationSession, StreamModerationConfig

6. Create packages/moderation/src/services/live-moderator.test.ts: Test frame sampling triggers classification, keyword detection in transcript triggers flag, accumulated violations trigger disconnect, temp ban is applied after disconnect
7. Create packages/moderation/src/services/keyframe-extractor.test.ts: Test interval calculation (1s for first 30s, 5s after), test that extraction returns correct number of frames for given duration
8. Update packages/moderation/src/index.ts to export KeyframeExtractor, AudioTranscriber, LiveModerator
9. Update services/moderation-worker/src/handlers/video-handler.ts to use KeyframeExtractor instead of simulated frame URLs
acceptance_criteria: KeyframeExtractor calculates correct frame timestamps: 30 frames for first 30s (1/s) + (duration-30)/5 frames after
LiveModerator emits 'flag' event when profanity keyword detected in transcript within 5s of input
LiveModerator emits 'disconnect' event after configurable violation threshold (default 3)
AudioTranscriber interface accepts audio buffer/URL and returns structured transcript with timestamps
Video moderation pipeline: extract frames -> classify each -> aggregate worst scores -> policy decision
pnpm turbo typecheck test build --filter=@quant/moderation passes
